sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59216" key="ko/runqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κόρυνθ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n59216.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cake</tr_>, Id. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n59216.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> epith. of Apollo, near Asine, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἀρχ.Δελτ</foreign>.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:2:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
